evals.prompt: 我刚拿到 ATK-DNESP32S3-BOX0，想确认本机有没有 ESP-IDF 开发环境，并知道下一步怎么连接设备。
evals.expected_output: Uses the environment and device-detection stages, points to check-env.sh and detect-box0.sh, and explains ESP-IDF v6.0.1, esp32s3, serial port discovery, and ROM download mode.

evals.prompt: 帮我用网页方式确认 BOX0 属于 ESP32-S3，最好能看到 Flash、MAC 和 USB 信息。
evals.expected_output: Uses the Web Serial validation stage, starts or references start-espinfo-demo.sh, instructs Chrome or Edge, and lists expected JSON fields including family, isEsp32S3, mac, flashId, flashSize, features, and usb.

evals.prompt: 我要在 BOX0 上做一个最小自定义系统：开机显示文字和图片，按键切换，长按关机。
evals.expected_output: Uses the simple app example and hardware map, references lcd_demo main.c and xiaozhi config.h, gives button, LCD, power-hold GPIOs, and proposes build/flash/monitor validation.
